title: relay: inbox_uri parsed twice to extract domain and path separately
description: In both relay::add and relay::remove, the inbox_uri is passed to url::Url::parse twice in succession: once to extract the host/domain (lines 100-103 / 175-178) and once to extract the path (lines 104-106 / 179-181). A single parse call can yield both the host and path, eliminating one redundant allocation and parse.
close_reason: Fixed: URL parsed once, both host and path extracted from single result.
